name: CppIndia Session Documents
description: Slides, notes, and code samples from all CppIndia tech talks and CppIndiaCon conferences. The central knowledge repository for the community.

name: C++20 Ranges Demo Collection
description: A curated collection of C++20 ranges examples — from basic filter/transform to custom range adaptors. Great for learning and reference.

name: coro-gen
description: A header-only C++20 coroutine generator implementation. Provides a Python-style generator that works with range-based for loops.

name: modern-cmake-starter
description: A modern CMake project template following best practices — target-based design, CPM for dependencies, clang-tidy and clang-format integration.

name: simd-experiments
description: Benchmark-driven experiments with AVX2/NEON SIMD intrinsics. Includes matrix ops, string processing, and image filter kernels.
